name: Spicy Roasted Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup frozen passion fruit purée, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the garlic and jalapeños on a flat-top grill or in a skillet over medium-high heat until they are golden brown, about 3 minutes.
2. Remove the roasted garlic and jalapeños and let them cool completely.
3. In a blender, combine the cooled garlic mixture with orange juice, lime juice, salt, and chopped bell pepper. Purée until very smooth.
4. Transfer the purée to a mixing bowl and stir in the mayonnaise and passion fruit purée until well combined and achieving a uniform color.
5. Serve the sauce with Snapper Cakes or other appetizers. Makes 1 to 1-1/2 quarts.
